title: R4's Day Counter
description: A counter that displays the day on start and new morning.
body:
A day counter that displays the in-game day on log-on and on new day. Works on singelplayer and multiplayer.

![An image zoomed in around the a player's hotbar that shows the text "Day 9" above it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9207e05d961729ee811a0ace4302bf43a1d8dfdf.png)

Should create no conflicts as long as the actionbar is free for a few seconds after log-on and on new day.

Requiers no setup and can be uninstalled in-game by typing uninstall and selecting the function from this datapack.

Please send any issues or suggestions to me at r4drr4@gmail.com!
